# QuickSplit: Tip & Bill Calculator

> QuickSplit is a free tip calculator and bill splitter app for Android, built with Flutter by Devs Wizard. It splits restaurant bills instantly among up to 100 people, calculates tips, and works 100% offline with no account and no tracking.

## Key facts

- Name: QuickSplit: Tip & Bill Calculator
- Developer: Devs Wizard (also written DevsWizard) — https://devswizard.com
- Platform: Android (Google Play)
- Price: Free
- Download: https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.devswizard.quicksplit
- Website: https://quicksplit.devswizard.com/

## Features

- Instant tip and bill calculation in real time as you type
- Split a bill evenly among up to 100 people in one tap
- Multi-currency: USD, GBP, AUD, CAD, EUR
- Dark mode with full Material 3 theming
- Works 100% offline — no internet connection required
- Privacy first: no account, no tracking, all data stays on device

## FAQ

- Is QuickSplit free? Yes, free on Google Play with no subscription and no interrupting ads.
- Does it work offline? Yes, 100% offline; all math runs locally on the device.
- How many people can it split between? Up to 100 people.
- Does it need an account? No sign-up, email, or login required.
- Which currencies? USD, GBP, AUD, CAD, EUR.
- Is it on iPhone? Currently Android only, via Google Play.
- Is my data private? Yes; no personal data collected, nothing uploaded to any server.

## Links

- Home: https://quicksplit.devswizard.com/
- Privacy Policy: https://quicksplit.devswizard.com/privacy.html
- Google Play: https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.devswizard.quicksplit
- Developer: https://devswizard.com
